values.text: Pace v0 is implemented and verified. One structured run now produces three review surfaces, compact TOON context, and portable evidence artifacts.
Turn structured agent runs into evidence-backed web, email, and PDF reports that humans can review with confidence.
Built a three-state review queue with isolated report scrolling and responsive output previews.
Created reusable Unlayer Elements reports for web, email, document, plain text, and design JSON.
Added a validated AgentRun schema with lossless TOON and JSON editing and round-trip support.
Added deterministic artifact generation, PDF rendering, and automated verification.
Vite transformed 27 modules and emitted production assets
Three run states and Web, Email, PDF views exercised in Chrome
All fixtures encode and decode without data loss
Document preview invokes native Save as PDF flow
MEDIUM RISK · Implementation complete. Evidence collected. Human review can begin.
Pace v0 consumes structured run data but does not connect directly to an agent harness. Mitigation: A strict schema plus editable TOON and JSON keeps integration boundaries explicit and testable.
PDF saving depends on browser print support
Interactive PDF saving hands the document to the native print dialog. Mitigation: The repository also includes a deterministic headless Chrome PDF export command.
19 files and 4,506 additions implementing Pace v0
Real Pace run rendered in the review workspace
PDF, TOON source, and Unlayer design JSON
TypeScript, tests, and production build on every push
Agents produce work faster than humans can confidently review.

values.preheaderText: Ready for review: Build Pace v0
